_comment: TEMPLATE FILE - Copy this to appsettings.json and fill in actual values. NEVER commit appsettings.json to source control.
_setup: Use 'dotnet user-secrets' for development, environment variables for production, Azure Key Vault for cloud.

ConnectionStrings._comment: Never put real credentials here. Use environment variable: ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection

Jwt._comment: Key must be at least 32 chars. Use: openssl rand -base64 32 to generate.

Gateway._comment: API key for inter-service communication. Use: openssl rand -hex 32

Services._comment: URLs for downstream microservices. Use Docker service names in compose, k8s service names in Kubernetes.

Anthropic._comment: Get your API key from https://console.anthropic.com. Use env var: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

Cors._comment: List allowed origins. Restrict in production!
